name: Veal with Fiddlehead and Shiitake Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound pancetta, cut into 1/4 inch dice
kosher salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
8 fresh shiitake mushrooms, stemmed, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pancetta in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry until pancetta turns light brown and fat is rendered. Remove pancetta from the skillet with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Season the veal cutlets with salt and pepper and dust with flour. Add them to the skillet and sauté until just cooked through, about 3 minutes per side. Remove veal from pan and keep warm.
3. Melt the butter in the skillet. Add the garlic and cook for about 1 minute. Add the sherry and deglaze the pan. Add the shiitake mushrooms, fiddleheads, and reserved pancetta and cook for 5 minutes. Divide the veal among 4 plates. Spoon the sauce over and serve immediately.
